player_notes.jayson tatum: Expected to play in Game 7 vs. 76ers despite exiting Game 6 with an apparent left leg injury. Monitor for minutes restriction or reduced effectiveness.
player_notes.kevin durant: OUT for Game 6 vs. Lakers (ankle injury). Has missed most of Houston's playoff series; significant boost to Lakers props, shifts usage to other Rockets.
player_notes.franz wagner: OUT for Game 6 vs. Pistons (calf strain), second straight missed game. Increasingly unlikely to return this series; major role/usage shift for Magic teammates.

game_notes.HOU vs LAL: Kevin Durant (OUT) removes Houston's star from Game 6; elevated usage expected for remaining Rockets (Alperen Şengün, Jalen Green et al.), and Lakers defenders face lighter load.
game_notes.ORL vs DET: Franz Wagner OUT again (calf), boosting usage for remaining Magic starters/wings in Game 6.
game_notes.BOS vs PHI: Jayson Tatum expected to play Game 7 but left leg injury warrants caution on his points/minutes props. Terrence Shannon Jr. started for Minnesota (injury fill-in) — not applicable here, but Tatum injury is the key note for this game.

suggested_context_updates.current_context_fact: G6 (Apr 30) diary: 'post-game news confirms he exited G6 with an apparent calf injury with MRI results pending, which is the most consequential development of the entire series; his 29 minutes and 3 AST are consistent with the injury limiting his late-game playmaking, and the structural uncertainty around his G7 availability transforms what was a competitive series conclusion into a potentially catastrophic BOS health crisis.'
suggested_context_updates.conflict: Shams Charania reports the Celtics expect Jayson Tatum to play in Game 7 vs. the 76ers after exiting with an apparent left leg injury.
suggested_context_updates.suggested_action: Update the BOS vs PHI series diary and injury landscape to note that Tatum is expected to play in G7 per Shams. Remove 'potentially catastrophic BOS health crisis' framing and replace with 'Tatum expected active for G7; monitor for any minutes restriction or in-game limitation given the calf concern remains present even if he plays.'

suggested_context_updates.current_context_fact: LAL vs HOU G5 diary: 'Durant's status (listed DOUBT per injury report) remains the critical HOU variable — HOU has now won G5 without him, but their ceiling with a healthy Durant is structurally different and has not materialized in this series.' Injury landscape: 'Durant (right knee contusion from practice Apr 16) for G1 — missed G1, availability for G2 (Apr 21) uncertain.'
suggested_context_updates.conflict: Multiple sources (ESPN, Shams Charania) confirm Kevin Durant will NOT play in Game 6 vs. the Lakers due to his lingering ankle injury.
suggested_context_updates.suggested_action: Update the LAL vs HOU series diary and injury landscape to confirm Durant is OUT for G6. Note the injury has shifted from 'right knee contusion' framing to 'ankle injury' per latest reports. HOU must again rely on Thompson-Sengun-Smith three-man attack for G6.

suggested_context_updates.current_context_fact: DET vs ORL series diary does not mention Wagner being ruled out for G6. Wagner is listed as having returned from a 48-game absence and appearing in the play-in and early series games.
suggested_context_updates.conflict: News confirms the Magic have ruled Franz Wagner OUT for Game 6 vs. the Pistons due to a calf strain, his second straight missed game, with it appearing increasingly unlikely he returns in this series.
suggested_context_updates.suggested_action: Add Franz Wagner (ORL) to the active injury concerns section noting he is OUT for G6 with a calf strain and unlikely to return in the series. Update the DET vs ORL series diary G6 preview to reflect ORL will again be without Wagner, significantly altering their offensive and defensive depth.
